title: Golem Spawn Fix
description: A fix for the Iron Golem spawn
body: This is a mod that fixes an issue which causes small objects (snow, buttons, grass...) to obstruct Iron Golems spawning ![mod video demonstration](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/dYvFPEKH/images/cd44ee3cd872f129bfa87fde0615f4a710f403a7.gif) Works with: - Buttons - Candles - Carpets - Snow - Small plants - Flowers - Pots **Compatible with [Golem Spawn Animation](https://modrinth.com/mod/golem-spawn-animation)!** **Inspired by [Wither Spawn Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/wither-spawn-fix)** [CurseForge ](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/golem-spawn-fix)
